## 📦 Type of Change

- [ ] 🪳 Bug fix — Fixes an issue or defect
- [ ] ✨ New feature — Adds new functionality
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor — Code changes without affecting functionality
- [ ] 📝 Documentation — Updates to docs only
- [ ] ✅ Tests — Adds or updates tests
- [ ] ⬆️ Dependency update — Updates project dependencies
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🛠️ Configuration or build system
- [ ] 🚧 Other (please describe below)
